'''yasunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobro|dobro]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobro|dobro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yasunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsinith|yæsinith]] || [[word:yæsinij|yæsinij]] || [[word:yæsinish|yæsinish]] || [[word:yæsini|yæsini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasusunuth|yasusunuth]] || [[word:yasusunuj|yasusunuj]] || [[word:yasusunush|yasusunush]] || [[word:yasusunu|yasusunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasunuth|yasunuth]] || [[word:yasunuj|yasunuj]] || [[word:yasunush|yasunush]] || [[word:yasunu|yasunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasufnuth|yasufnuth]] || [[word:yasufnuj|yasufnuj]] || [[word:yasufnush|yasufnush]] || [[word:yasufnuf|yasufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasunuthu|yasunuthu]] || [[word:yasunuju|yasunuju]] || [[word:yasunushu|yasunushu]] || [[word:yasunuku|yasunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasunuth|yasunuth]] || [[word:yasunuj|yasunuj]] || [[word:yasunush|yasunush]] || [[word:yasunu|yasunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasunuthul|yasunuthul]] || [[word:yasunujul|yasunujul]] || [[word:yasunushul|yasunushul]] || [[word:yasunukul|yasunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasunuthuthu|yasunuthuthu]] || [[word:yasunujuju|yasunujuju]] || [[word:yasunushushu|yasunushushu]] || [[word:yasunuku|yasunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasunuthun|yasunuthun]] || [[word:yasunujun|yasunujun]] || [[word:yasunushun|yasunushun]] || [[word:yasunukun|yasunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasunuthuoro|yasunuthuoro]] || [[word:yasunujuoro|yasunujuoro]] || [[word:yasunushuoro|yasunushuoro]] || [[word:yasunukuoro|yasunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
